# Governance audit — 2026-Q1

**Date**: 2026-04-15
**Auditor**: human + governance-auditor agent
**Period**: 2026-01-01 to 2026-03-31

## Constraints reviewed

| Constraint | Declared | Actual | Drift? |
|---|---|---|---|
| Consistent formatting | deterministic (ruff) | enforced — every PR | none |
| Lint clean | deterministic (ruff) | enforced — every PR | none |
| Coverage floor | deterministic (pytest --cov-fail-under) | enforced — every PR | none |
| No bare except | deterministic (ruff E722) | enforced | none |
| Spec-first ordering | deterministic (script) | enforced | none |
| **Spec conformance** | **agent** | **not running** | **drift detected** |
| Objections resolved | agent | running on ~80% of PRs | partial drift |
| Choices captured | agent | running on every PR | none |

## Findings

1. **Spec-conformance check has not been running.** Constraint was
   declared agent-enforced six months ago but no agent or human has
   been verifying that PR code matches its referenced spec.
2. **Objections-resolved check runs intermittently.** Roughly 20% of
   PRs slipped through without a thorough disposition walk.

## Actions

1. Moved the spec-conformance check into the `/spec-implement`
   workflow itself, so it runs every time the orchestrator runs.
   See CHOICES.md C-005 (related — model-routing for adversarial
   review).
2. Added a PR template item that requires the objections record
   path. CI fails the PR if the field is empty (except for
   exempt-labelled PRs).

## Next audit

2026-07-15 (start of 2026-Q3).
